agentUtterance.text: Which of the following are you calling about? You can say 'advantage voice', 'mobile phones', 'high speed internet', 'television services', or 'business phone'
I'm sorry, I couldn't hear that. Please say 'advantage voice', or press1, 'mobile phones' press 2, 'high speed internet' press 3, 'television services', 4, or 'business phone', press 5".
